name: Lemon-Sweet Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour and salt to coat the chicken pieces.
2. In a skillet, brown the chicken on both sides in hot oil.
3. Transfer the chicken pieces to a crock pot.
4. Blend the thawed lemonade concentrate, 1/2 cup water, brown sugar, catsup, and vinegar in a bowl.
5. Pour the mixture over the chicken in the crock pot.
6. Cover and cook on high heat setting until tender (3 to 3 1/2 hours).
7. Remove the chicken to a platter and keep warm.
8. Skim fat from the pan juices.
9. Measure the juices; add water if necessary, to make 1 1/4 cups liquid.
10. Place the liquid into a saucepan.
11. Blend 3 tablespoons of cold water with the cornstarch in a separate bowl.
12. Stir the cornstarch mixture into the saucepan juices.
13. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly, then remove from heat.
14. Pass the sauce over the chicken; serve over rice.
